title: CLICK PLC Hardware User Manual — Ch.3 Installation and Wiring (C0-USER-M)
sheet: Ch.3 — DC Input & Output Wiring Methods, sinking/sourcing (p.3-31)
why_selected: Page index 30 is a genuine 24 VDC PLC discrete-I/O wiring diagram (verified by render 2026-07-13): sinking/sourcing DC inputs, NPN/PNP field-sensor termination (Input/Common, DC NPN Sensor sinking, DC PNP Sensor sourcing, Field Device, Supply, Ground, 20-28 VDC), and DC output-to-load wiring. Completely different category/standard from the NEMA starter. Publicly published OEM chapter PDF; provenance verified 2026-07-10.
license_note: Publicly published OEM literature; ownership retained by AutomationDirect; retained only for read-only interpreter testing.
